details: 5 active + 2 staged listing IDs are all unique within the staged 7-card runtime
Each row's report URL contains a unique listing_id query param; the ref token (pilot-listing) is shared by design (it's a class label not a per-row id)
listing_id values are kebab-case ASCII; encodeURIComponent applied in PilotClerkshipListings.tsx line 132
All 7 cards' report URL includes ?ref=pilot-listing&listing_id=<listing_id>; footer feedback link uses ?ref=pilot-feedback (no listing_id by design)
pilot-011 and pilot-012 listing IDs are distinct from the active 5; same ref token (pilot-listing) is intentional shared class
pilot-011-PA-upmc-western-psychiatric-hospital report URL is reserved (not yet routable from any public page since staged file is not imported)
pilot-012-NY-nyc-health-hospitals-lincoln report URL is reserved (same status)
Each listing_id maps 1:1 to a row in the evidence join map and via the source URL to the candidate / staged runtime evidence manifests
Report URLs use stable kebab-case listing_id; never the institution display name
Report URL contains only ref + listing_id query params; no source URL / archive URL / screenshot path exposed in URL
No reviewer_notes field is exposed via the report URL
Report URL is /contact (not /apply); no language in PilotClerkshipListings.tsx implies application-through-USCEHub

**BLOCKER B-001:** /contact/page.tsx does NOT read the ref or listing_id query params. They are present in the URL bar but ignored. Form action is decorative — Send Message button is type=button with no submit handler. Reports for staged or active listings would currently get lost as generic contact messages.
Same as above — ref query param is also ignored.
**BLOCKER B-002:** Send Message button is type=button with no onClick or onSubmit. The contact form does not actually submit anywhere today.
**BLOCKER B-003:** Even if the form were wired up to submit
column4: the form fields collected are firstName/lastName/email/subject/message — listing_id and ref are not added to the payload.

details: The existing scripts/validate-usce-report-intake.ts validates the Maine route's local-report-intake feature. The Pilot route does not have a local-report intake hook wired up; the per-card report links instead point to /contact. This sprint flags this as a separate intake-design decision.
correction_queue_join_key column in listing_map.csv = listing_id (1:1 mapping)
See staged_runtime_report_issue_mapping_1_future_intake_payload_schema.json — defines required + optional fields
See staged_runtime_report_issue_mapping_1_correction_queue_spec.md — defines 10-step internal workflow
Future intake schema explicitly forbids passport/visa/medical/immigration documents (privacy_notes section)
